indications.text:
GVOKE is indicated for the treatment of severe hypoglycemia in pediatric and adult patients
with diabetes ages 2 years and above.

1.1 Severe Hypoglycemia in Adult and Pediatric Patients Aged 2 Years and Older with
Diabetes
GVOKE is indicated for subcutaneous use for the treatment of severe hypoglycemia in adult and
pediatric patients aged 2 years and older with diabetes.
